decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent through aggressive plays and efficient spellcasting. By utilizing cheap spells and creatures to control the tempo of the game, the UR Aggro deck aims to deal damage quickly and maintain board advantage. The deck is designed to be fast-paced and proactive, aiming to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. Through a combination of aggressive creatures and versatile spells, the UR Aggro deck seeks to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and creatures with evasion to pressure the opponent early in the game. By playing efficient threats like Eddymurk Crab and Riverpyre Verge, combined with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm, the deck aims to quickly deplete the opponent's life total. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out provides additional disruption, while card draw and selection from cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help to maintain tempo and find key pieces. Overall, the deck aims to win through aggressive and evasive creatures backed up by burn spells and disruption.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with cheap spells and creatures, taking advantage of cards like Impractical Joke and Sleight of Hand to maintain card advantage. The deck also utilizes spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State to control the board and push through damage. The main goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent while using cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Slickshot Show-Off to pump up creatures and finish the game quickly. This deck aims to end the game before the opponent can stabilize and turn the tide.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's game plan and apply pressure with cheap spells and aggressive creatures. By combining bounce effects like Boomerang Basics with efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to control the board and deal direct damage. Utilizing cards like Flow State and Stormchaser's Talent to pump up creatures and burst spells like Burst Lightning and Roaring Furnace, the deck looks to close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. With cards like Aven Interrupter, Aang, Swift Savior, and Floodpits Drowner, the deck aims to apply pressure early on while also using cards like Erode and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Avatar's Wrath and Airbender Ascension provides additional finishers and ways to close out the game. Overall, this deck focuses on being proactive and efficient in its strategy to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck revolves around controlling the board and hand with a combination of removal spells, draw engines, and counterspells. By using cards like Gran-Gran and Firebending Lesson to deal with threats, while also generating card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom and Jeskai Revelation, the deck aims to out-value and outlast the opponent. Additionally, Iroh's Demonstration provides valuable lifegain while Tablet of Discovery and Spirebluff Canal help fix mana issues. Overall, the deck focuses on resource management and controlling the game's pace to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and aggressive creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to efficiently control the board with burn spells while deploying threats like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to chip away at the opponent's life total. The deck also includes some card draw and counterspells for added consistency and protection. By maintaining a balance between aggression and disruption, the deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

This aggro deck focuses on quick and aggressive plays to overwhelm opponents. It features a mix of low-cost creatures like Bloodghast and Hardened Academic to apply early pressure, backed up by powerful spells like Burst Lightning and Carnage, Crimson Chaos. The mana base is optimized for speed and consistency, with a focus on red, white, and black sources. Key cards like Cecil, Dark Knight and Tersa Lightshatter provide additional utility and resilience. The deck aims to establish a fast board presence and close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence with low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, while using cards like Earthbender Ascension and Icetill Explorer to ramp up mana production. The deck also utilizes cards like Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer to enhance the power of creatures and push for damage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, making use of mono green cards and synergies to maintain board control and pressure.

The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence through aggressive creatures and utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to overwhelm the opponent. Ba Sing Se and Escape Tunnel provide additional ramp and card advantage, while Demolition Field offers removal options. The deck also includes some protection with cards like Defend the Rider and Esper Origins. With a strong curve and consistent mana base, the Mono Green Aggro deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain a steady stream of threats to secure victory.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on tempo and aggression, utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Eddymurk Crab to maintain control and pressure the opponent. With a mix of cheap spells like Opt and Burst Lightning, as well as efficient creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Riverpyre Verge, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Secret Identity and Into the Flood Maw add versatility and disruption, while the mana base allows for consistent access to the deck's powerful spells and creatures.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and quickly dealing damage to the opponent. It uses cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board and protect its creatures. The key strategy is to utilize cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Slickshot Show-Off to pump up the creatures and win the game quickly. Multiple card drawing spells such as Opt and Sleight of Hand are included to ensure a consistent flow of threats. The inclusion of unique cards like Secret Identity and Multiversal Passage adds versatility and surprise elements to the deck.

The deck focuses on using a combination of cards to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back into play for a devastating reanimation combo. Cards like Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex help with the reanimation process, while cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Superior Spider-Man provide strong creatures to bring back. The deck also includes control elements like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence created through efficient reanimation strategies.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on utilizing cheap control spells to continuously disrupt the opponent's game plan while drawing cards to maintain card advantage. It also includes cards like Agna Qel'a and Monument to Endurance to provide additional value and resilience. The deck aims to control the game by bouncing opponent's threats with Boomerang Basics and Combustion Technique, while setting up powerful spell combos with Artist's Talent and Firebending Lesson. Multiversal Passage allows for flexibility in mana fixing, while cards like Gran-Gran and It'll Quench Ya! provide additional support and utility.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently while controlling the board with bouncing spells like Boomerang Basics and Flow State. Eddymurk Crab and Drake Hatcher provide additional threats while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand keep the deck running smoothly. The deck also includes some versatile cards like Multiversal Passage and Secret Identity for added flexibility in different situations.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to control the board early with cheap spells like Boomerang Basics and Burst Lightning, then push damage through with efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck also utilizes instant and sorcery spells to trigger prowess abilities on creatures like Stormchaser's Talent. Overall, the goal is to keep up the pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.
